text.title: Pattern Bank Tagging Schema Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs to procedure to output for a typical instance of Pattern Bank Tagging Schema.

example.scenario: Bank of 200 patterns: schema applied retroactively. 12 entries previously 'other' surface get reclassified after team review (3 new vocabulary additions). Retrieval 'find me all good onboarding patterns' returns 17 entries in <1s.
example.trace: r1-closed-vocab-surface → r2-closed-vocab-intent → r3-pattern-type-trinary → r5-source-link-required → bank tagged
